33.reason: [Queue size insufficient; enqueuing more elements than the array size, causes out-of-bounds write. Should mark visited when enqueuing to avoid duplicates and keep queue size within n.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Queue size insufficient; enqueuing more elements than the array size, causes out-of-bounds write. Should mark visited when enqueuing to avoid duplicates and keep queue size within n.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Array 'dui' has size n, but duplicate enqueues cause t to exceed n-1, leading to out-of-bounds write and runtime error.

22.reason: The loop condition should be h < t. Using h <= t causes the loop to process an invalid index when h equals t (queue empty), leading to accessing uninitialized memory or out-of-bounds access if t increments further, causing Runtime Error or logical errors. Specifically, when the queue is empty, h==t, and the loop continues, accessing dui[h] which is invalid.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition should be h < t. Using h <= t causes the loop to process an invalid index when h equals t (queue empty), leading to accessing uninitialized memory or out-of-bounds access if t increments further, causing Runtime Error or logical errors. Specifically, when the queue is empty, h==t, and the loop continues, accessing dui[h] which is invalid.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The loop condition should be h < t. Using h <= t causes the loop to process an uninitialized or invalid index when h equals t (queue empty), leading to out-of-bounds access or processing garbage data, which causes Runtime Error or incorrect output.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The loop condition should be h < t, not h <= t. When h == t, dui[h] is out of valid range (since t points to next empty slot), leading to undefined behavior or reading uninitialized memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The loop condition should be h < t, not h <= t. When h == t, dui[h] is out of valid range (since t points to next empty slot), leading to undefined behavior or reading uninitialized memory.]

65.reason: [This extra newline causes the output to have 5 lines instead of 4. The problem expects exactly 4 lines: DFS before, BFS before, DFS after, BFS after. This last printf("\n") adds a fifth empty line.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This extra newline causes the output to have 5 lines instead of 4. The problem expects exactly 4 lines: DFS before, BFS before, DFS after, BFS after. This last printf("\n") adds a fifth empty line.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This extra newline causes the output to have 5 lines instead of 4. The problem expects exactly 4 lines: DFS before, BFS before, DFS after, BFS after. The last printf("\n") adds an unnecessary blank line at the end.]
